changes: 📝 Enhanced Submissions: Modernized the 'Submit Paper' interface with dedicated split buttons for easily adding Photos and PDFs.
📎 Better Media Handling: Improved the submission workflow to ensure both images and PDF documents are reliably attached to support emails.
🖼️ Image Loading Fix: Resolved a crash in the submission screen by properly integrating the Coil library for flawless gallery photo rendering.
⚙️ Version Update: Bumped the app version to 1.10.14 and synchronized the version display in the Settings menu.
title: Submission UI && Gallery Fixes
